title: mdtoc epic final join: replay full suite + end-to-end generate/check, verdict epic
description: Verifier join. Owns no source. Replay python3 -m unittest discover over projects/mdtoc/tests (parser, inserter, slugger, cli, integration). Run end-to-end: generate --in-place twice on the fixture and assert byte-identical (idempotency), check exit 0 when fresh and exit 1 when stale, confirm stdlib-only. depends_on the direct-consumption leaves T-021,T-022,T-027,T-028 which transitively close over the whole mdtoc DAG. Verdict the epic done.
acceptance_criteria: ROLE = verifier, EPIC FINAL JOIN. Owns NO source file - it only replays and verdicts. May append a verdict note only.

depends_on = T-021, T-022, T-027, T-028: these are the direct-consumption leaves (this task replays test_parser [T-021], test_inserter [T-022], test_slugger+slugger [T-027], and cli+integration+fixture [T-028]). This leaf set TRANSITIVELY closes over the entire mdtoc DAG (T-028->T-027->{T-023,T-024,T-025,T-026}), so requiring it done == requiring the whole epic done, with no false-cascade edge to the superseded candidate files.
Replay the full suite: `python3 -m unittest discover -s projects/mdtoc/tests -t projects/mdtoc` must be all-green (parser, inserter, slugger, cli, integration).

End-to-end replay on the fixture: run `python3 -m mdtoc generate <fixture> --in-place` twice and assert the file is byte-identical after the second run (idempotency); `python3 -m mdtoc check <fixture>` returns exit 0 when fresh; tamper the TOC and confirm check returns exit 1.
Confirm stdlib-only: no third-party imports anywhere under projects/mdtoc/.
Verdict the epic: mark this task done only after replaying (producer != approver - this task authored nothing).

SHARED CONVENTIONS (all mdtoc tasks): Python 3.9+ stdlib ONLY, no pip deps. Package dir projects/mdtoc/mdtoc/ (namespace package; __init__.py is created only by T-028, so test files must add projects/mdtoc/ to sys.path and import as `from mdtoc.parser import ...`). Tests use unittest and must pass via `python3 -m unittest discover -s projects/mdtoc/tests -t projects/mdtoc`. No file listed here may be created/edited by any other task (disjoint ownership).
